query: Which day is the best to publish on tiktok

result.response_text: Processing analytics query for "Which day is the best to publish on TikTok" using the data_analysis workflow.
result.response_json: {"action":"execute","workflow_id":"data_analysis","parameters":{"query":"SELECT published_date, AVG(engagements) AS metric_value FROM documents WHERE LOWER(platform) = LOWER('tiktok') GROUP BY published_date ORDER BY metric_value DESC LIMIT :max_rows","params":{"max_rows":20},"metric":"engagements","operation":"average","query_category":"metrics"}}
